/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/l3_tc10_test.dir/l3/tc10_test.cpp.o  -o l3_tc10_test  liblog_l3_test_support.a ../log_l3/liblog_l3.a ../log_agent/liblog_agent.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so ../log_service/liblog_service.a ../log_writer/liblog_writer.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.5.0 -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfmt.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so
